mapper.sql: select bookkeeping_id, entry_no, business_date, entry_type, category, case when entry_type = '1' and category = '1' then '维修收入' when entry_type = '1' and category = '2' then '保养收入' when entry_type = '1' and category = '3' then '配件销售' when entry_type = '1' and category = '4' then '其他收入' when entry_type = '2' and category = '1' then '配件采购' when entry_type = '2' and category = '2' then '人工工资' when entry_type = '2' and category = '3' then '房租水电' when entry_type = '2' and category = '4' then '其他支出' else category end as category_name, total_amount, paid_amount, unpaid_amount, status, fund_account_id, fund_account_name, payment_method, handler_name, customer_name, customer_phone, license_plate, car_model, business_desc, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from acct_bookkeeping
mapper.update:
update acct_bookkeeping set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where bookkeeping_id in
#{bookkeepingId}
mapper.select: select payment_id, bookkeeping_id, entry_type, payment_amount, payment_time, fund_account_id, fund_account_name, payment_method, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from acct_bookkeeping_payment where bookkeeping_id = #{bookkeepingId} and del_flag = '0' order by payment_time asc, payment_id asc
mapper.update:
update acct_bookkeeping_payment set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where bookkeeping_id in
#{bookkeepingId}
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) from acct_bookkeeping where del_flag = '0' and entry_type = '1' and date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m-%d')
select coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) from acct_bookkeeping where del_flag = '0' and entry_type = '1' and date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
select coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) from acct_bookkeeping where del_flag = '0' and entry_type = '2' and date_format(business_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(sysdate(), '%Y-%m')
select coalesce(sum(unpaid_amount), 0) from acct_bookkeeping where del_flag = '0' and entry_type = '1' and unpaid_amount > 0

select category, case when category = '1' then '维修收入' when category = '2' then '保养收入' when category = '3' then '配件销售' when category = '4' then '其他收入' else category end as category_name, coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) as total_amount from acct_bookkeeping where del_flag = '0' and entry_type = '1' group by category order by category

select category, case when category = '1' then '配件采购' when category = '2' then '人工工资' when category = '3' then '房租水电' when category = '4' then '其他支出' else category end as category_name, coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) as total_amount from acct_bookkeeping where del_flag = '0' and entry_type = '2' group by category order by category
